positive: A mesmerizing, hyper-detailed cosmic forestscape composition, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and crystalline structures. The primary subject is a central grouping of elegant, curved geometric organic shapes reminiscent of glowing ferns and stardust patterns. Use a vibrant, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, magenta, and subtle emerald green. The style must be a clean, modern vector illustration mixed with cosmic watercolor wash elements, emphasizing sharp, defined lines and clean silhouettes. The lighting should be dramatic, emanating entirely from the subject matter (glow effect). The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced, ideal for a square apparel print, printed on a solid, neutral-colored background. Minimal negative space surrounding the main subject for maximum impact.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, noisy, signature, logo, watermark, text, words, copyright, grainy, amateur, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, 3d render, photorealistic, dirty, smudge
